landing_intro: This is a short, anonymous survey about digital technology in water management in Jordan. Your answers help research. This chatbot only collects your answers — it does not give advice or help.
landing_anonymous: Your answers are anonymous. We do not ask for your name, phone number or address.
data_use_body: We collect your answers about digital water tools, plus a few general details like age group and area. We do not collect your name, phone number, exact address or location. Your answers are stored securely and seen only by the research team. They are used to study how useful a chatbot survey is for collecting this feedback. You can skip any question or stop at any time. You can ask us to delete your responses.
consent_body: Taking part is voluntary. The survey is anonymous. You can skip any question, go back one step, or stop at any time. Your answers are stored securely and used only for research. This chatbot does not give advice, referrals or support.
consent_agree: I agree and want to continue
consent_required: We can only continue if you agree. You are free to leave at any time.
redirect_offtopic: Thanks. For this question, could you tell us about your experience with the water service or its digital tools? You can also skip this question.
redirect_unclear: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you say it in a different way? You can also skip this question.
ack_sensitive: Thank you for sharing. You can skip this question or stop at any time — whatever feels right for you. This survey can't offer help or advice.
optional_hint: Please describe your experience briefly. Do not include your name, phone number, exact address, ID number, or other personal details. This question is optional — you can skip it.
quality_more_detail: Could you add a little more detail about your experience? You can still skip this question.
complete_body: Your answers have been submitted. Thank you for helping with this research.
complete_withdraw: If you would like your answers removed, you can contact the research team.
stopped_body: That's completely fine. Any answers you gave so far have been saved anonymously. Thank you for your time.
no_advice_footer: This chatbot collects answers only. It does not give advice or support.
assistant_note: This assistant answers using approved project knowledge only. It may not contain live or official service information.
assistant_greeting: Hi — ask me a general question about water management in Jordan or about this project.
assistant_boundary: General water-service and project information only. This assistant is not connected to participant survey answers. Please do not share personal details.
assistant_feedback_pre: To give feedback about water services, use the
assistant_footer: General information only — not advice, and not connected to your survey answers.
assistant_error: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
assistant_timeout: The assistant response stopped unexpectedly. Please try again.
review_subtitle: Please review your answers before submitting. You can edit any answer by clicking 'Edit'.
submit_warning: Once submitted, your answers are final and cannot be changed.
